global_brief: 今日AI领域持续主导技术动态，多模态模型在应用与学术层面均出现关键进展：视觉模型发布带来的下载增长显著超越聊天模型，但商业转化仍是难题；同时，Anthropic与OpenAI分别通过合资企业加速企业级服务落地，而Elon Musk诉OpenAI案的开庭审理为行业治理投下变数。

highlight_facts.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
highlight_facts.summary: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.；Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
